_comment: JPL Horizons barycentric (SSB, @0) equatorial-frame (refplane='earth', = layup BCART_EQ) state of 3I/ATLAS (C/2025 N1), captured 2026-06-20 via astroquery.jplhorizons.Horizons(id='C/2025 N1', location='@0', epochs=<epoch_jd_tdb>, id_type=None).vectors(refplane='earth'). The epoch is the epoch layup selects when fitting tests/data/3I_ATLAS_ades.csv; regenerate (and re-measure tolerances) if that fixture or layup's epoch logic changes, or to refresh against an updated JPL solution.
